text:
Created attachment 240402
Screenshot: around half of the row is invisible

Where alignment is not to the top of the row: 

* following a link causes invisibility of part of the required text

– it's necessary to scroll up to, or past, the top of the row, before reading. 

<https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/zfs/#zfs-term-dataset>, for example.
